title: Dataset v3 production corpus
description: Large, diverse, production-style Online Boutique observability corpus for testing ranking, ML, NLP, AI, and agent approaches without overestimating performance.

collection_strategy.why_batch_collection: The full corpus is intentionally large for a local Kubernetes lab. Batch collection lets us validate data quality and resume without discarding completed runs.

plans.purpose: Broad scenario mix preserving v2.1 hard cases.
Restart, recovery, traffic spike, and near-miss coverage.
Latency, bad configuration, and service-local hard cases.

benchmark_tracks.description: Uses clean labels and structured metadata to catch broken dataset contracts.
Uses delayed and noisy Jira-style issue text to evaluate production-like retrieval.
Uses logs, metrics, traces, alerts, and Kubernetes evidence without Jira metadata leakage.
Future benchmark mode that pairs each Jira issue against candidates from all corpus runs.

promotion_gates.raw_runs: Every collected run must pass validate-dataset-run.ps1 with 0 errors.
promotion_gates.derived_outputs: Every collected run should build ranking outputs with F1@1 and F1@3 present.
promotion_gates.aggregate_outputs: Corpus aggregate and holdout reports must include MRR, Recall@1, Recall@3, F1@1, F1@3, and nDCG@3.
promotion_gates.quality_review: Inspect failures before claiming model progress. Near misses and service-confusion errors are expected and useful.
